title: Define Polygons
text: Define Polygons Draw and manage polygons for use within the map widget. Each area of the user's screen that is potentially sensitive to mouse action is called a polygon. Each polygon has a tag name and a tag title associated with it. The tag name is the value returned in the widget field when the tag is selected. The #Areas field indicates the number of areas that have been defined for the tag. The tag's title is used as tool tip text and in the pop-up menu. The Enable field indicates whether the polygon is available to the user at run time. Table 1. Icons on the Define Polygons form Icon Meaning Selection mode Drawing mode Preview polygon Delete polygon Separate polygon Delete tag Fields Enable/Disable Polygon (Disable) Tag Name Tag Title #Areas Was this topic helpful?
